hooks.prompt: Review the conversation. Was there a user correction or a failed attempt? If YES, respond with a JSON object: {"continue": false, "stopReason": "Record a lesson: describe what went wrong and how to avoid it next time. Append to .claude/skills/workflow-knowledge/lessons.md with the appropriate category [DX], [ARCH], [SECURITY], [FAIL], or [PERF]."}. If NO corrections or failures, respond: {"continue": true}. Context: $ARGUMENTS
